debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard ≤ @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₁ : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
    refine' ⟨M, hM, _⟩
    <;> rfl
  -- Use the definition of MatchingNumber and the fact that M.encard is in the set to conclude the proof.
  have h₂ : M.encard ≤ sSup {n | ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard} := by
    apply le_csSup
    · -- Prove that the set is bounded above
      use ⊤
      intro x hx
      simp_all [le_top]
    · -- Prove that M.encard is in the set
      exact h₁
  -- The above gives us the desired result
  simpa [ν] using h₂
